text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting this year, Agnes Tachyon and I will be
challenging senior races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to visit the shrine for New Year's Day
to offer our prayers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still haven't told Agnes Tachyon that, for the
upcoming year, I've planned out an ambitious
agenda with the aim of dominating the medium
distance G1 races and the Grand Prix.
choice_data_list:
(Maybe this way I can help her in surpassing her
limits!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What were you so fervently wishing for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was meaning to discuss this with her in person
later. But since she asked, I divulge the details of
my prayer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh. So, we're dominating the medium
G1 races and the Grand Prix now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That would include the Osaka Hai, the
Takarazuka Kinen, the autumn Tenno Sho, and
the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're a greedy guinea pig. Might you be putting
too much faith in the gods?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Or rather, this is the first I'm hearing about this
race agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I brace myself for her response.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Very well! Not a bad idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon grins with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! Plan A went well, so we must go on the
offensive this year! Lest our efforts be for naught!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I assure you that I'll go at it with everything I have
at my disposal. You can consider your wish
realized!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing such a bold declaration out of Agnes
Tachyon, my mind can't help but wander back to
one year ago.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What do we have here? "The Classic Triple
Crown."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's our goal for this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's our goal for this year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Like I've been saying, I can't guarantee if I will
actually race or not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to back then, her reply now is nigh
unthinkable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, quit being so sentimental. Over several
hundred billion of our cells undergo death and
rebirth on a daily basis. Naturally, we too would
experience change.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Though that isn't to say I don't understand what
you mean.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Last year was one full of twists and turns—a year
to remember for certain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let bygones be bygones. Now that we've finished
our New Year's shrine visit, shall we head back?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: No, training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It isn't often that our interests are fully aligned,
so I thought to make the most out of it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Don't you agree?
choice_data_list: Today's a holiday, we should take it easy.
Yeah, let's go back and train!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Take it easy, you say. Hmm, that is a bit
unexpected.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose, sleeping away the New Year's
holiday for a try doesn't sound all that bad.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As it's New Year's, what do you say we try to find
a hammock on sale?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, didn't you know? The swaying of a hammock
is proven to have a positive effect in helping one
de-stress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, we go shopping for hammocks at the DIY
store and promptly put them to good use.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Either way, this year looks to be an eventful one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Fortune slips, huh? Unexpected, but intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to see how markings on a mere slip of
paper might affect mental changes in my guinea
pig.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes. Through this, I can study the extent at
which you put your faith in the divine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I politely refuse her sudden survey. Either way,
this year looks to be an eventful one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now we're talking!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We have much to do. Last year was a busy one
full of twists and turns.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This year will be one of great strides toward
success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all the excitement behind her smile, I can't
help but nod in kind. This year looks to be an
eventful one!
